subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Kingdom! Good news is being received from India, that, praise be to God, the divine fragrances are being diffused
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت الله خبرهای خوشی از هند میرسد که الحمد لله نفحات الهی در انتشار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
